creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

Better update (from 2.6.7 to 2.6.9):

diff -r -u /usr/ports/databases/cego/Makefile databases/cego/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/databases/cego/Makefile	2010-08-11 16:27:55.000000000 +0200
+++ databases/cego/Makefile	2010-08-20 11:58:14.000000000 +0200
@@ -2,10 +2,10 @@
 # Date created:				Jun 12, 2010
 # Whom:					Kurt Jaeger <fbsd-ports@opsec.eu>
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/databases/cego/Makefile,v 1.7 2010/08/11 03:30:37 sahil Exp $
+# $FreeBSD: ports/databases/cego/Makefile,v 1.6 2010/08/08 21:54:20 sahil Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	cego
-PORTVERSION=	2.6.7
+PORTVERSION=	2.6.9
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.lemke-it.com/
 
diff -r -u /usr/ports/databases/cego/distinfo databases/cego/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/databases/cego/distinfo	2010-08-11 16:27:55.000000000 +0200
+++ databases/cego/distinfo	2010-08-20 11:58:19.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (cego-2.6.7.tar.gz) = 3173226ba5251e5d506ff610c54df3b9
-SHA256 (cego-2.6.7.tar.gz) = 405ef705812372ebf814b895aab08510e0d050e70672a3a824b5fef7a1647a0c
-SIZE (cego-2.6.7.tar.gz) = 632711
+MD5 (cego-2.6.9.tar.gz) = f137247a9dcc0d52b09b106fca945855
+SHA256 (cego-2.6.9.tar.gz) = e1592f56591507e371efc2b4f106e76226a195a3ca79213c6cf97669891f9c76
+SIZE (cego-2.6.9.tar.gz) = 621003

-- 
pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                        10 years to go !
